local_shell.title: Select Shell
local_shell.description: Select a local terminal shell to launch. Press Cmd+T to use the default shell.
local_shell.working_directory_placeholder: Leave empty to use current directory

jump_server.title: Add Jump Server
jump_server.default_key_desc: Use the default SSH key (~/.ssh/id_rsa, etc.)
jump_server.agent_desc: Authenticate using the system SSH Agent
jump_server.agent_hint: Make sure the SSH Agent is running and contains the required key(s)
jump_server.kbi_not_supported_hint: Jump host currently does not support keyboard-interactive/2FA

root_node.title: Add Root Node
root_node.passphrase_placeholder: If the key is passphrase protected

auto_route.title: Auto-Route Connection
auto_route.description: Select a target server from your saved connections. The system will automatically compute the optimal jump host path.
auto_route.no_connections_hint: Save some connections first. The topology graph is automatically generated from your saved connections and their proxy chain settings.

export.title: Export Configuration to .oxide File
export.forwards_owner_notice: Selected saved port forwards will be exported together with the connection configurations they belong to.
export.embed_keys_description: Include private key file contents for portable backups. Keys will be extracted to ~/.ssh/imported/ on import.
export.include_app_settings_description: Export terminal appearance, behavior preferences, and other OxideTerm app settings.
export.include_plugin_settings_description: Export declared plugin settings stored in OxideTerm local storage.
export.password_placeholder: At least 12 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, digits, and symbols
export.security_encryption: File encrypted with ChaCha20-Poly1305, military-grade security
export.security_contains: File contains selected connections, forwards, and key passphrases
export.security_settings: Include global settings: {{app}}; include plugin preferences: {{plugin}}
export.security_passwords_excluded: Saved server passwords are never included in the .oxide file
export.security_no_session: Session data is NOT included — only connection configurations
export.security_keep_safe: Please keep the encryption password safe, as it cannot be recovered if lost
export.warning_passwords_excluded: {{count}} password-auth connection(s) will be exported without their saved server passwords.
export.error_select_something: Please select at least one item to export
export.error_select_one: Please select at least one connection
export.error_password_length: Password must be at least 12 characters long
export.error_password_complexity: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special characters

import.title: Import Configuration from .oxide File
import.instructions_2: Enter the encryption password set during export
import.instructions_3: You can select which connections to import after decryption
import.instructions_4: Included key passphrases will be securely stored in system keychain; saved server passwords are not part of the file
import.warning_text: Import will process all selected connections at once. How name conflicts are handled depends on the conflict strategy you choose below.
import.preview_will_rename: {{count}} connections will be renamed due to conflicts:
import.preview_will_skip: {{count}} connections will be skipped due to conflicts:
import.preview_will_merge: {{count}} connections will merge into existing connections:
import.preview_embedded_keys: Private keys will be extracted to ~/.ssh/imported/
import.preview_forwards: This file contains {{count}} port forwarding rule(s) (informational only, not auto-applied)
import.preview_app_settings: This file will also restore global OxideTerm settings.
import.preview_plugin_settings: This file will also restore {{count}} plugin preference item(s).
import.auto_close: Window will automatically close in 2 seconds...
import.passwords_not_included: Saved server passwords are never included in .oxide files. Password-auth connections may require you to re-enter the password later.
import.error_password: Incorrect password, unable to decrypt file
import.error_tampered: File verification failed, data may have been tampered with

host_key.unknown_message: This is the first time connecting to this host. Please verify the fingerprint below is correct before continuing.
host_key.changed_warning: Warning: The host key differs from what was previously saved! This could mean: 1) The server was reinstalled or changed its key; 2) You may be under a man-in-the-middle attack (MITM). Please verify with your server administrator before continuing.
host_key.confirm_prompt: If you confirm the key change is legitimate, type "{{host}}" to continue:

save_preset.title: Save as Preset Connection
save_preset.notes_2: For other authentication methods, edit the connection after saving.
save_preset.notes_3: This connection will be available in the connections list after saving.

drill_down.title: Drill Down into New Server
drill_down.agent_desc: Authenticate using the system SSH agent.
drill_down.agent_hint: Ensure your SSH agent is running and has the required key(s) loaded.

edit_connection.title: Connect to {{name}}
edit_connection.agent_desc: Authenticate using the system SSH Agent
edit_connection.agent_hint: Make sure your SSH Agent is running and contains the required key(s)

kbi.title: Two-Factor Authentication
kbi.default_instruction: Please respond to the server's authentication prompts.

new_connection.title: New Connection
new_connection.description: Enter details for your new SSH connection.
new_connection.name: Name (Optional)
new_connection.agent_desc: Authenticate using the system SSH Agent
new_connection.agent_hint: Ensure the SSH Agent is running and has the required keys loaded
new_connection.certificate_note: This is for OpenSSH CA-signed certificates, not regular SSH keys. If you have a private key with a passphrase, use the SSH Key tab instead.
new_connection.twofa_hint: The server will prompt for credentials during connection. Common uses: TOTP codes, hardware tokens, challenge-response.
new_connection.twofa_warning: Note: 2FA connections cannot be auto-reconnected. You'll need to manually reconnect if the session drops.
new_connection.agent_forwarding_hint: Only enable for trusted servers. A malicious server could use your local SSH agent to authenticate to other hosts.

proxy_chain.title: Proxy Chain
proxy_chain.count: {{count}} jump server(s) configured - click to expand

new_connection.test_not_supported_kbi: Test connection is not supported for 2FA authentication
new_connection.test_proxy_chain_not_supported: Proxy-chain diagnostics are not supported yet. Use Connect to validate the full route.

terminal.title: Terminal Settings
terminal.description: Configure appearance and behavior of the terminal.
terminal.custom_font_stack_hint: Enter font names in priority order, separated by commas
terminal.renderer_hint: Canvas is recommended on Windows for better stability. Requires restart to apply.

buffer.title: Buffer Management
buffer.description: Configure backend scroll buffer for reconnect and search.
buffer.lines_hint: Older lines will be automatically discarded when limit is reached.
buffer.new_sessions_only: Changes only apply to new sessions.
buffer.save_hint: Buffer content stays in memory for search while the session remains active.

ssh_keys.title: SSH Keys
ssh_keys.description: Manage local SSH keys detected in ~/.ssh/
ssh_keys.no_keys: No keys found in default location.

ai.title: OxideSens
ai.description: Configure inline OxideSens with your own API.

enable.title: Enable AI Capabilities
enable.shortcut_windows: Press Ctrl+Shift+I in terminal to open AI panel
enable.shortcut_mac: Press Ctrl+I / Cmd+I in terminal to open AI panel

privacy.title: 🔒 Privacy Notice
privacy.local_requests: All AI requests are initiated from your local machine
privacy.context_only: Only the selected context is sent to the API
privacy.keychain: API key is stored securely in system keychain

config.title: API Configuration
config.base_url_hint: Works with OpenAI, Ollama, OneAPI, or any compatible endpoint.
config.api_key_hint: Stored in system keychain, never saved to disk.

context.title: Context Limits
context.description: Control how much context is sent to the AI.
context.token_hint: Token estimates are approximate (1 token ≈ 4 characters for English).

confirm.title: Enable AI Capabilities
confirm.intro: Before enabling AI features, please confirm you understand:
confirm.point_local: All AI requests are initiated from your local machine
confirm.point_no_server: No intermediate server is used by OxideTerm
confirm.point_context: Only selected context is sent to your configured API
confirm.point_responsibility: You are responsible for your API provider's data policies

sftp.title: SFTP Transfer Settings
sftp.description: Configure file transfer behavior and performance.

concurrent.title: Max Concurrent Transfers
concurrent.hint: Maximum number of files transferred simultaneously. Higher values may improve throughput but increase memory usage.

bandwidth.hint: Set to 0 for unlimited. Common values: 1024 (1 MB/s), 5120 (5 MB/s), 10240 (10 MB/s).

conflict.title: Default Conflict Action
conflict.hint: What to do when a file with the same name already exists at the destination.

errors.import_host_success: Successfully imported "{{name}}" as a saved connection!
